subject: redBus - Tax Invoice
body:
Dear Khushi Tyagi,
Thank you for booking your ticket with redBus.
Ticket details:
Ticket number (TIN): TV8552922393
From: Jaipur (Rajasthan)
To: Noida
* Bus operator is the primary service provider of passenger transportation services. MAKEMYTRIP (INDIA)
PRIVATE
LIMITED ("redBus") acts only as an intermediary for passenger transportation services. GST on passenger
transportation services is collected and remitted by redBus in the capacity of E-commerce operator as per
section 9(5) of the Central Goods and Services Act, 2017 and respective State GST Act. This invoice has been
issued by redBus only with a limited purpose to comply with legal obligations as an e-commerce operator
under GST law.
Best,
Team redBus

Security is changing rapidly, demanding that we all innovate in response. In this edition, Chris Betz, CISO, Google Cloud shares four key lessons we learned about using AI to the defender’s advantage while building AI Threat Defense. Just a year ago, it would take months or even years for a good application security team to find thousands of vulnerabilities. Today, a team equipped with multiple AI mod
